notable_excerpts: We have already committed ourselves for 50% electricity consumption from RE. We will achieve this by 2025 December and Net Water Positive, Zero Waste to Landfill (ZWL) and Net Zero by 2047.
In 2024-25, we also have commissioned first ICT with Ester oil, natural vegetable oil.
85MW solar PV project at Nagda has been commissioned.
We are exploring alternatives of SF6 gas, and we have recently ordered three nos. breakers with the green gas which will be installed at Imphal substation.
In day time, from solar power, green hydrogen will be generated and in night time, electricity will be generated from Green Hydrogen to electricity.
In CSR, we are committed for social upliftment and our corporate social responsibility.
Second digital lab for women's skill training has been set up in Bangalore, NSTI for women.
For boosting energy health care, in emergency health care in Karnataka an ambulance was donated to the Indian Red Cross Society in Karnataka.
We have all-women substation which we call ‘Pink station’ at Chandigarh, at Yelahanka, at Tughlakabad and at Misa.
We also have plan to make 4 more substations as pink station or all-women substation by October’2025.
We have come out with Anti-Bribery Management System ISO 37001 certification by BIS.
We remain committed to our goals and core values of transparency, reliability and sustainable growth.
We have 5 functional directors - 2 Government Nominee Directors, 3 Independent Directors including one-woman Independent Director, Smt. Sajal Jha.

chain_of_thought: The environmental disclosures are strong, with commitments to renewable energy, carbon neutrality, and innovative projects like green hydrogen and BESS. Social initiatives focus on community health, women's empowerment, and maintaining a zero fatality status. Governance practices emphasize transparency, anti-bribery measures, and board independence. Overall, the company demonstrates a comprehensive approach to ESG with specific targets and achievements.
strengths: Strong commitment to renewable energy and carbon neutrality.
Comprehensive social initiatives, including women's empowerment and community health.
Transparent governance practices with anti-bribery certification.
weaknesses: Limited specific details on governance risk management strategies.
